mechanism: Contains alkaloids, flavonoids and triterpenoid saponins. These constituents show anti‑inflammatory, antiallergic, antimicrobial and anticancer activities; saponins and flavonoids can modulate immune responses and inhibit tumour cell growth【29869447318919†L501-L528】.
contraindications: No well‑documented contraindications; due to saponins and alkaloids, excessive intake may cause gastrointestinal irritation or interact with medications.
